creator: davrozas@visi.net
text:
When I did "Novice Installation" from floppy disk set, when it came 
to insert the first installation floppy, the message was very unclear: "Insert floppy into floppy drive unit A"
Which floppy, it does not say.  

Also, if I inserted the wrong floppy, it did not give me a chance to insert the right one. It quit the installation instead.
